name: Holiday Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Hazelnuts or macadamia nuts or pecans
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9-inch round baking pan; line the bottom with wax paper. Grease the paper and flour the paper and pan. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, cocoa, instant coffee, baking soda, and salt. Add the butter, sour cream, egg, and vanilla; beat on low speed of an electric mixer until blended. Increase the speed to medium; beat 3 minutes. Pour the batter into the prepared pan. Bake 30 to 35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool 10 minutes. Remove from the pan to a wire rack; gently peel off the wax paper. Cool completely. Prepare FUDGE NUT GLAZE. Place the cake on a serving plate; pour glaze evenly over the cake, allowing some to run down the sides. Arrange nuts in a decorative design on top. Refrigerate until the glaze is firm, about 1 hour.
8 to 10 servings.
